introducing.name: Alicia,
introducing.title: Full-stack web developer
introducing.description: After being a nurse for a few years, I decided to pivot to web development. I am passionate about creating digital experiences that are both functional and pleasant to use. Curious and determined, I like to take on challenges and learn continuously to provide concrete and innovative solutions. My rigor, team spirit and enthusiasm are my allies to contribute effectively to your projects. So, shall we talk about a future common project?

projects.title: My projects
projects.githubLink: And many more available on my GitHub !
projects.ecochallenges: Eco-challenges is a web application that allows users to create ecological challenges and invite their friends to take them on.
projects.nintendream: Nintendream is the web application of an imaginary theme park based on the famous video game franchise. It features a back-office allowing administrators to manage the park's attractions, restaurants and hotels.
projects.travelApp: Web application allowing you to find hotels and restaurants in multiple cities around the world. Creation of our REST API.
